title: Default collation causes inconsistent results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 INT);
UPDATE t1 SET c1 = 'test' WHERE (c1 IS NULL) OR (c1 = '');
UPDATE t1 SET c1 = 'test' WHERE (c1 IS NULL) OR (c1 = '');
key_bug_features: Default collation affects UPDATE statement behavior
